feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: they're sharing a drink they call loneliness
entry.summary:
Author: spinnychairs

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,540Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: It was on a normal patrol when Batman first encountered Clark Kent, dressed up in the rags of drunkenness and looking to interview him. It's this conversation that sends Batman down the spiral that is Clark Kent and Superman, right at the peak of the loneliest time of his life. But even the most jovial of Boy Scouts have their own troubles, and Clark is no exception. He's more than the intruder Bruce thinks of him as, and the Batman finds himself intrigued. Especially when he finds they may share that aching feeling, that craving for others. And it's at a makeshift bar in Gotham, under bulbous lights and the hum of hangovers, where they connect.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Behind Our Masks
entry.summary:
Author: WriteMeLikeDia

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,257Chapters: 11/20Kudos: 16

Summary: Clark Kent is sent to Gotham, tasked with uncovering Bruce Wayne's secret identity as Batman. At first, the banter and tease doesn't take them far, until the two eventually fall into a very complicated relationship.

entry.title: Places to be
entry.summary:
Author: Sir_Ackermann

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,332Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 97

Summary: Bruce has been stuck in a bad mood for weeks, the people around him are tired of his attitude. But it all changes when Alfred and dick convince him to go to a last minute gala. entry.title: Free Fall
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,993Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 8

Summary: Bruce Wayne has been maintaining a file. It is eleven pages, encrypted, labeled TLI — Tactical Liability Index, and it has absolutely nothing to do with tactics. Clark Kent has been paying attention. These are, it turns out, related problems. (Or: Bruce spends eight months filing his feelings under increasingly implausible headings. Clark waits him out. Alfred makes the Sumatran. Nobody is surprised except Bruce.)

entry.title: The cold boy that met the sun
entry.summary:
Author: Arachnophobic_SpiderMan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,145Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 114

Summary: What happens when Alfred Pennyworth finds 15 years old Bruce Wayne's suicide plans ? What happens when Bruce Wayne runs away ? What happens when he finds himself in Smallville, Kansas, on the anniversary of his parent's murder ? He meets Clark Kent, that's what happens.orI need more of fics where Bruce and Clark meet as teenagers. Honestly i wrote this for myself. Tags may be added as the story goes fyi. Also english is very much not my first language and it shows, so no hate pls okayy? thanksss xx

entry.title: The Man of Stone of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: WriterDMathis

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,970Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Sequel to Luminous Fragments From The Veil Above. After the fall of his homeworld, Kal—El begins his new life on Earth, adopted by Bruce Wayne and his four sons. As he discovers Earth, its strange customs, and the warmth of a new family, he also finds love with Bruce—and a home he never thought he’d have. And his Earth name is known as Clark. Clark Wayne.

entry.title: ʞuıl ʎɥɔʇǝʞs ɐ ʞɔılɔ noʎ uǝɥʍ suǝddɐɥ ʇɐɥʍ sı sıɥʇ 'ǝǝs
entry.summary:
Author: RenkonNairu

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,920Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Clark Kent is an investigative journalist who's articles have placed three billionaires under legal scrutiny already. Once was lucky, twice was a coincidence, but three times is a pattern and people have already dubbed Kent the 'Billionaire Breaker' for his exposes on the upper class. Brucie Wayne is a billionaire with a secret and he does not want the Billionaire Breaker discovering it. Under the guise of flirting, Brucie texts Clark a link and when the flustered farm boy opens it, the link opens a backdoor hack into his phone. But Batman discovered much more than he expected in the Metropolis reporter's phone. Clark Kent's tech is more advanced than anything else on Earth. Its almost as if Clark is... an alien

entry.title: Kryptonian Reproduction, an Observation
entry.summary:
Author: Winkaku

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,413Chapters: 26/26Kudos: 1,567

Summary: They'd been caught in each others orbit for some time now and, quite frankly, Clark should have seen this coming. Crazy was part and parcel to Gotham after all... let alone his own life. His father had warned him about mad scientists, but Clark had the distinct feeling that this was not what he'd envisioned in the slightest.A series of PWP vignettes wherein the plot is entirely background.AKA: that time I tried to make a kinky science fic that turned into a writing challenge that turned into a crazy romp with associated art pieces. Fun was had by all.

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,624Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 61

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,372Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 125

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing be euthanized without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: How to be liked by your partner’s parent by Clark Kent
entry.summary:
Author: YoursOdi

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,330Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Clark Kent is absolutely in love with Bruce Wayne and no one could ever possibly stop that love… well maybe except for his father, Thomas Wayne but Clark tries to leave a good first impression when they meet. It shouldn’t be that difficult though because Thomas only really dislikes Superman and no way in hell would Clark Kent be Super- Wait, why are you looking like that Clark?—————— A small little fic about how Thomas Wayne would react to his son being in a relationship with the Man of a Steel. It got some elements from Flashpoint but you don’t have to know the lore to understand this fic (I still very recommend to watch/read it).

entry.title: Conflict of Interest
entry.summary:
Author: BlackLynx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,159Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 11

Summary: A reimagined first meeting between Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne during their early days as Superman and Batman. Following Clark's perspective, the young journalist finds himself under the relentless gaze of Bruce Wayne and Batman, unsure whether it is Clark or Superman he is trying to decipher – unable to help his nerves from acting up.Features Lois Lane and Clark being best friends, Bruce being a bit cocky and forward, Zatanna as Bruce's beard, a dazzling Gala, some heroics, and a quickly resolved misunderstanding.

  • Bruce Wayne Knows Clark Kent is Superman

entry.title: When we met
entry.summary:
Author: Nao271098

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,776Chapters: 23/37Kudos: 57

Summary: The story of Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent before they were Batman and Superman Still trying to do my canonically correct story, not sure of my success but any recommendations are welcome This is basically "How is started" but slower and I kinda take another take here. English is not my first language *DOING A BIT OF EDITION, the history doesn't really changed so you shouldn't need to read again everything*

entry.title: All My Traitor Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,595Chapters: 30/33Kudos: 6

Summary: Gotham, 1935. Bruce Malone is a private investigator with a shingle, a past he doesn't advertise, and a client who smells like jasmine and trouble in equal measure. Diana Prinkipas needs a treasure found. Clark Kent needs a job. Bruce needs to stop noticing things he has no business noticing. Nobody gets what they need. A noir in sixteen movements, one interrogation tape, and a coat button that costs twenty years.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
